content.en:
The Xiyue Clan's catastrophe came, and Ye Tian did not invade the Xiyue Clan's world.

Maybe he could rob some resources in this great robbery, and even snatch some Origin Rule Robbery Crystals, but he couldn't look at that bit anymore.

If he has time to find resources, he might as well go to cultivate.

This time, his goal was to practice with all his might, and strive to survive a few more physical tribulations.

Therefore, Ye Tian's body descended on the world of the Xiyue Clan.

When the Great Tribulation came, Ye Tian built a cultivation place in an area outside this forbidden land, where he urged the Eternal Talent Tribulation to absorb the power of the Tribulation.

During the last Dark Forbidden Tribulation, he had obtained the Eternal Talent Tribulation, but at that time, the Dark Forbidden Tribulation had already begun for a long time, so he didn't have enough time to cultivate, so he only survived the two Flesh Tribulations.

But this time is different, he has been absorbing the power of the Tribulation here since the beginning of the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth Tribulation, so his progress will definitely be greater.

Of course, the further the physical body tribulation goes, the more difficult it becomes, especially after five physical body tribulations, if you want to complete another physical body tribulation, it takes too much tribulation power.

However, many of the strongest people in the Flesh Tribulation Realm, once they have completed the five tribulations of the Flesh Body, they can go to the Invincible Realm, and there is no need to pursue a higher realm, otherwise it will take too much time and energy, and it will even be easy to have some accidents, and they will fall into the foreign world.

Ye Tian does not snatch resources, nor does he compete for the origin rules to rob crystals, so the Xiyue clan and other exotic forces will not come to Ye Tian's trouble, there is really a strong person who is looking for trouble, and the other party is absolutely dead.

Time flies.

this day.

With the help of the Eternal Talent Tribulation, Ye Tian finally started the third physical body tribulation.

I saw that Ye Tian's physical body was subjected to unimaginable impacts, and countless thunder wind blades were born from every cell world, trying to destroy Ye Tian's physical body, but Ye Tian's physical body was too powerful, and in the end, the tribulation did not destroy Ye Tian's physical body, but made his physical body even stronger.

"The Three Tribulations of the Flesh Realm!"

Ye Tian said happily.

However, he also felt that his absorption and refining of the power of the Tribulation was too rough.

No matter how powerful the eternal talent tribulation is, it is only a talent, for example, no matter how powerful the ancestral endowment is, it is far inferior to the ancestral skill created, and the power of the talent extension must be created and comprehended, so that the power of the talent can be limited.

If he was able to create a secret technique that was in line with the Eternal Talent Tribulation, he might be able to absorb the refining tribulation power faster, and then his cultivation speed would be even faster.

Over the years, Ye Tian has also tried to create such a secret technique.

In addition, he used the replication body again and again to overdraw the ancestral soul to stimulate the ability to evolve, so the process of creating this secret art was progressing very smoothly, and now he was at the stage of being on the verge of a kick.

He needed to absorb the power of refining and refining while trying to modify this secret technique before he could finally perfect the secret technique.

It is only during the Great Tribulation that he can quickly perfect, otherwise he will not be able to realize anything at all just by relying on his usual enlightenment, and without actual cultivation, he will not be able to create such a secret technique at all.

And this great tribulation of the Sunset Moon Clan's heaven and earth is a good opportunity.

Finally, when the Great Tribulation was about to reach the late stage, Ye Tian finally created a secret technique that could quickly absorb the power of the Tribulation and refine it, which was at least ten times more powerful than simply using the Eternal Talent to refine the power of the Tribulation.

This secret technique can barely be regarded as an invincible level secret art, and it was named the secret technique of transformation by Ye Tian!

Through the Secret Technique of Transforming Tribulation, Ye Tian's speed of absorbing and refining the power of the Tribulation increased dramatically, and he used the power of the Tribulation to quickly refine his physical body.

Finally, he ushered in the fourth tribulation of the physical body, and once he survived, he would be the strongest of the four tribulations of the physical body.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to successfully cross the tribulation and step into the ranks of the powerhouses of the Four Tribulations Realm of the Flesh.

"According to my cultivation speed, when this great tribulation of the Xiyue Clan Heaven and Earth is over, I should be sure to step into the ranks of the strongest in the flesh body five tribulation realm!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

If he didn't have the secret technique of dissolving the catastrophe, he would naturally not be able to do it, but now he can do it.

In this way, the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth Tribulation was gradually coming to an end, and one by one the exotic forces returned to their own world, while Ye Tian was still absorbing the power of the Tribulation to refine the flesh body, preparing for the impact of the flesh body Five Tribulations Realm.

Perhaps in the eyes of the Xiyue Clan, Ye Tian was a strange person, after all, they didn't know the secret of the strongest attacking the invincible, and they didn't know that they needed to absorb the power of the robbery to refine their bodies.

Otherwise, they would know how terrifying Ye Tian was.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian stepped into the Four Tribulation Crystals of the Flesh Body, and if he was other supreme powerhouses, countless Great Tribulations could not do this.

Finally, when there were only tens of millions of years left in the Xiyue Clan's Heaven and Earth Tribulation, Ye Tian finally ushered in the fifth physical tribulation, and without any pressure, he easily survived this tribulation and stepped into the realm of the five tribulations of the physical body.

After stepping into the realm of the five tribulations of the flesh, Ye Tian had a feeling, no, it should be said that he sensed a barrier of shackles in the underworld.

It is a barrier between the strongest and the invincible.

At this time, if he enters a foreign world that is not a great tribulation period, and tries to collide with the rules of the foreign world with his physical body again and again, if he can adapt to the rules of the foreign world and make the physical body change qualitatively, then there is hope to break the shackles in this underworld and step into the realm of the invincible.

However, Ye Tian does not have this idea at the moment.

The Five Tribulations Realm of the Flesh Body is nothing, his goal is even higher, he wants to impact the Invincible Realm with a perfect foundation.

"The Sunset Moon Clan's Heaven and Earth are not of much value to me at the moment, it's time to find the second Exotic Heaven and Earth that is about to enter the Great Tribulation!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

When Ye Tian returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain, he once again used his copy body to infiltrate other exotic worlds and find out the dates of those exotic world tribulations.

Soon, he discovered another exotic world that was about to enter the Great Tribulation.

This exotic world is called Hadesheng Heaven and Earth, and its strength is not very strong, similar to the Heaven and Earth of the Xiyue Clan.

What's more, the strongest people of the Immortal Heaven and Earth were not very decisive and did not immediately destroy the first-order gate, and the time of the great tribulation was also mastered by Ye Tian.

So, Ye Tian waited silently, once he waited for the catastrophe of the Immortal Heaven and Earth to arrive, he would forcibly enter the Immortal Heaven and Earth through the first-order gate, so that he could directly occupy this first-order gate and turn it into his own door, just like the first-order gate of the Haitian Holy Sect.

After more than a dozen realm eras, the catastrophe of the Immortal Heaven and Earth arrived.

this day.

Ye Tian left the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm and came to the forbidden land that led to the Immortal Heaven and Earth.
